text: The Blinkit ad which pops up, does not a normal exit option, like other ads ! It has a sticky menu, without exit options and without shutting down the app. Kindly ensure that such apps do not reduce your users. Earlier I had commented "Nice app ! with a reasonable amount of Ads to support the app". But this is no longer true !

it is easy to use, very friendly but as time being passed it has been showing lots of inaccuracy, sometimes it's shows it on the boarding station but it's already gone through the station, dependency on this app is getting too low by day it needs to get a regular updates from the local trains, you cannot completely rely on the trains location through app
replyText: Dear User, Sorry for the inconvenience caused. We are aware of the issue and we are working on it.

text: Extremely useful app. I have been using it for more than ten years and admire every improvement with every update. Recently I travelled to Pune from Mumbai and was sweetly surprised to find the Pune switch already present. No need to look for any another app of this type. I suggest that with regards to bus routes/stops, there are many bus stops with given names but the alternative names are also common. If on long pressing the stop, we get to see them it will be very helpful.
replyText: Dear User,Thanks for your feedback. We are continuously working on adding more features to our app to make your experience better.

text: Not working properly. Please update the app ASAP. 1. Train location not showing properly. 2. Issues with train timing also. Some time train didn't arrive in station but in app showing train already left station. Please update the app. So we can use in our daily basis. Thanks in advance.
replyText: Dear user, Please help us understand the issue you are facing in depth. Please share the detailed issue by writing to support@mobond.com. We'll ensure to look into it with utmost priority. Thanks!

text: Track your train feature seems broken. I am not able to switch off the radio button once I switchit on. It is not even getting auto switch off when I reach the destination. I am not able to track my train like few days ago.. please fix it ASAP.
replyText: Dear User , Kindly share screen recording of the issue at support@mobond.com or what's app us on 7045112299 also mention app version so that we can understand and resolve your query on priority.

text: I am giving this app a zero rating because it is completely unreliable. Mindicator never shows the correct running status of trains. Due to the wrong information displayed by this app, I trusted it and missed my train. This caused me unnecessary stress, inconvenience, and loss of time. An app meant to help passengers should provide accurate and real-time updates, but Mindicator fails badly at this. I would strongly advise others not to rely on this app for train running status.
replyText: Dear User, Sorry for the inconvenience caused. Can you please share the details of the issue at support@mobond.com so that we can check and assist you better.

text: very bad on the days trains are cancelled. passengers buy the tickets and it then it is announced. also then if you have to take AC train then there is no option to upgrade. you have to go out of the station to again book the ticket. pathetic.also there is no one to guide there should be the system to inform passengers in advance about cancellations of trains. it can reflect on the app. the announcements on the platform are pathetic. its not heard at all.
replyText: Dear User, We understand your frustration. Unfortunately we do not have any authority over Railway operations. You can make a suggestion to railways by requesting a complaint/feedback form at the Station master's Cabin from your originating or terminating station

text: This is somehow outdated now. many train details both WR / CR are unavailable Just don't depend on train timings of this app. specially in Central ಲ್ ne. many trains r missing upon inform instead of getting things right they ask us to share screenshot of PF indicator. if any flaws in the app notified they should get it resolved quickly. but these people are not serious.
replyText: Dear User, Apologies for the inconvenience caused. Can you specify the train details which are not available in the app? Please email us at support@mobond.com so that we can look into it.

text: App is good, but one suggestion please update the bus routes also, because many newly added AC buses are not showing in the list. if you can updates Best and all other municipal corporation transport buses number will be very helpful for new commuter's.
replyText: Dear User, Thank you for your feedback. We are working on such a feature.

text: changing review after 2013. some bugs: live locations: taped yes (inside train) and continues even after journey is completed, resulting not allowing to share live on other trains. many times fails to show live location. Time table: Some are wrong.
replyText: Dear User, Sorry for the inconvenience caused. The issue has been resolved. Kindly update the app to the latest version (17.0.346 as of 23rd Jan 2026).Please let us know if you still face any issue at support@mobond.com or what's app us on 7045112299, so that we can understand and resolve your query on priority.

text: From the last few days, train tracking is not working properly. Some trains are showing, while others are not visible at all. Because of this inconsistency, it has become very difficult to track trains and plan travel. Please fix this issue as soon as possible.
replyText: Dear User, Sorry for the inconvenience caused. The issue has been resolved. Kindly update the app to the latest version (17.0.346 as of 23rd Jan 2026).Please let us know if you still face any issue at support@mobond.com or what's app us on 7045112299, so that we can understand and resolve your query on priority.

text: To improve train search functionality, please allow multiple checkbox selection when checking train availability. For example, if traveling from Kalyan, users should be able to select both Kasara and Asangaon to view all available trains on that route.
replyText: Dear User ,Thank you for your suggestion. We will forward it to our technical team for review. They will look into the possibility of implementing it in future updates.

text: Using this app while traveling by train. getting train timings for all fast local, Slow local, Mail train. its easy to use but sometimes times are not accurate about local train and Mail train running status sometimes inappropriate. can get information about ticket fare and also live chat sometimes helpful to see the trains exact location message by Passengers. Getting news about weekend megablock, BMC water supply cut news and many more options like bus taxi. Till now happy with the app
replyText: Dear User, Thank you for your feedback. Any suggestions are welcome.

text: Apps like m-Indicator set a great example of how public service apps should be developed. The app is free to use and provides accurate and helpful information. While minor errors may occur occasionally, the overall experience is excellent. Sincere thanks to the developers for their valuable effort. This app has made daily travel easier and more comfortable for a large number of users.
replyText: Dear User, Thank you for your feedback.

text: it is a useful app for seeing trains but sometimes it shows wrong updates it shows the train is there on the platform but in actual it has not yet reached or sometimes it shows no update even after refreshing
replyText: Dear User, Apologies for the inconvenience caused. Live Location is a crowd sourced feature and works best when multiple users are sharing the location of the train. We insist you to start sharing live location from your phone when ever possible and encourage fellow commuters too.
